rationale_top3: Nature & Location (29/30): Outstanding lakeside setting with excellent water access and natural surroundings, combined with convenient proximity to Newcastle amenities Cleanliness & Facilities (15/15): Exemplary maintenance standards across all park facilities demonstrating strong operational management Entertainment & Activities (15/15): Comprehensive range of family entertainment options and activities ensuring engagement for all ages
rationale_honourable: Site Size & Layout (9/10): Well-designed spacious sites providing comfortable accommodation, and Value for Money (12/15): Competitive pricing that reflects the quality lakeside experience offered
water_fun: Excellent lakeside location on Lake Macquarie providing direct water access for swimming, fishing, kayaking and other water-based activities
kids_play: Strong entertainment score indicates comprehensive children's facilities including playground equipment and organized activities suitable for various age groups
pet_detail: Solid pet score (8/10) suggests pets are welcomed with appropriate facilities and areas designated for pet-friendly accommodation
best_for: Lakeside family holidays, water sports enthusiasts, nature-based getaways, weekend escapes near Newcastle
